summary: Verified the just-shipped admin mentor drag-and-drop reordering, public /mentors card restyle, and slim payload performance optimisation. All backend (5/5 pytest) and frontend (UI + integration) checks pass. DnD reorders persist via /api/admin/mentors/reorder; legacy chevron up/down buttons are fully removed; /mentors page renders the 3-column card grid with the new CoachingPage-style cards (p-6, gap-6, college-logo experience strip) using a 40% smaller slim payload (2048 vs 3392 bytes for featured listing).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminComponents.jsx SortableMentorRow correctly threads dnd-kit refs/listeners via the renderRow callback, avoiding markup duplication — clean pattern.
PointerSensor activationConstraint distance:6 prevents accidental drags when admin clicks checkbox/edit/delete on a row — good UX.
handleMentorDragEnd does optimistic arrayMove + appends deleted mentors at end, then POSTs to /api/admin/mentors/reorder; on failure it re-fetches canonical state. Solid.
Drag handle is rendered ONLY on active rows (sortable && !isDeleted) so deleted-mentors section can't be re-ordered — correct.
ChevronUp/ChevronDown imports were cleanly removed; lint/runtime confirm no dead refs.

Public MentorsListing fetches /api/mentors/featured?slim=true via mentorsCache; slim payload omits `availability` (and `bio`/`email` per backend SLIM_EXCLUDE) yielding ~40% smaller response in our test data.
Minor: when there are 0 active landing-featured mentors in DB the /mentors page renders an empty grid silently — consider an empty-state message. Not a bug, UX nit.
test_credentials: admin@gradnext.co via POST /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin (returns flat user dict + auth_token JWT). Bearer token used in tests.
seed_data_creation: Set is_landing_featured=true on 3 existing mentors (Aparajita Subramanian, Kritika Jalan, Nikhil Nair) and seeded 2 availability slots on Aparajita to enable slim-vs-full byte comparison.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Mentor DnD: drag-handle-<id> selectors confirmed working; active-mentors-list testid in place; verified 26 handles, 0 legacy move-up/down buttons. Drag from index 4 to index 0 on UI changes order live and the underlying POST /api/admin/mentors/reorder persists the order (verified via reload+GET in pytest, count=3 returned). Slim featured payload 2048b vs full 3392b. 3 featured mentors are now seeded; you can reset is_landing_featured if needed.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs detected. Implementation matches the agent-to-agent context note.
